title: Privacy Policy
intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how Leave Planner collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.text: We collect information you provide during registration (name, email, date of birth) and data generated through use of the platform (leave requests, approvals, calendar data).

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.text: Your information is used solely to operate the Leave Planner service — processing leave requests, sending notifications, generating reports, and maintaining your account.

sections.title: 3. Data Security
sections.text: We implement data encryption at rest, secure HTTPS connections, role-based access control (RBAC), and Single Sign-On (SSO) integration to safeguard your data.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.text: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties. Your data is only accessible to authorized personnel within your organization based on their role and permissions.

sections.title: 5. Data Retention
sections.text: Your data is retained for the duration of your employment with the subscribing organization. Upon request, personal data can be deleted in accordance with applicable data protection regulations.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
sections.text: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data. Contact your organization's administrator or reach out to us at info@leaveplanner.com.

sections.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
sections.text: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
